arts.ttl: Tottenham's Guglielmo Vicario issues social media apology after coming under fire from supporters
arts.sum: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario issues an apology to Spurs supporters after he came under criticism for his actions following Thursday's defeat to AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Tottenham injury news, inconsistency and Guglielmo Vicario
arts.sum: I said after the game that we didn't perform anywhere near the level we wanted to or needed to. The best way to put last night's disappointment to one side is to perform well at the weekend and our league form hasn't been too bad over the recent period and we want to continue that.
